name: Sachem Capital Corp. 7.75% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock
summary: Sachem Capital Corp. 7.75% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock is a publicly traded real estate finance company specializing in originating, servicing and managing a diverse portfolio of first mortgage loans. Sachem Capital focuses on short-term lending opportunities. The company is headquartered in Branford, Connecticut.
